Enquire Now

How It Works

From diagnosis to live in weeks

1

Run the free assessment

Complete the 6-dimension tool. Get a scored report on your current stack — acceptance rate, routing, cost, local coverage, risk, and compliance.

2

Review findings together

We walk through the report on a call. Identify the highest-impact opportunities and agree on scope before any engagement starts.

3

Implement & launch

We handle PSP selection, integration support, routing rules, and local wallet enablement. Most clients are live within 4–6 weeks.

4

Measure and optimise

Ongoing monitoring with monthly reviews. We track acceptance rates, flag cost spikes, and expand into new markets as you grow.

Why Ebiya.sg

Built for SEA at scale

Every recommendation is grounded in hands-on experience with VISA, PayPal, and the full SEA wallet ecosystem.

Fast Implementation

Live in days, not months. We know every integration edge case in SEA cold.

Compliance Ready

PCI-DSS guidance, local regulatory mapping, and risk framework setup included.

Revenue Focus

Every recommendation is tied to acceptance rate, cost reduction, or conversion lift.

Regional Depth

Six markets, one team. Deep relationships with every major PSP and wallet in SEA.

Risk Management

Fraud rules, chargeback strategies, and velocity controls built for SEA patterns.

Dedicated Support

Direct access to a senior advisor — not a helpdesk ticket queue.

Market Coverage

All six SEA markets

Deep knowledge of every local payment method, wallet, and regulatory nuance.

🇸🇬

Singapore

PayNow, Cards, GrabPay, FavePay

🇲🇾

Malaysia

DuitNow, Touch 'n Go, Cards, ShopeePay

🇹🇭

Thailand

PromptPay, TrueMoney, Cards, LINE Pay

🇮🇩

Indonesia

GoPay, OVO, QRIS, VA Transfer, Cards

🇵🇭

Philippines

GCash, Maya, Cards, InstaPay

🇻🇳

Vietnam

VNPay, MoMo, ZaloPay, Cards

FAQ

Common questions

Still have something on your mind? Reach out directly — we respond within 24 hours.

Most implementations are complete within 4–6 weeks, depending on PSP complexity and the number of markets. We provide a detailed timeline before any engagement begins.
Not necessarily. We often work within your existing stack to improve routing, reduce costs, and add local methods. Sometimes a PSP change is recommended, but only when the numbers clearly justify it.
Our deepest experience is in travel (airlines, hotels, OTAs), e-commerce, marketplace platforms, and ticketing — all high-volume, margin-sensitive segments with complex SEA payment needs.
Yes. No credit card, no sign-up, no sales call required. You get a full analysis of your current payment stack with actionable recommendations.
Discovery, PSP selection, integration support, routing logic, local wallet setup, compliance checklist, and 30 days of post-launch support. Scope is agreed in writing before we start.
Yes. Chargeback management, dispute workflows, and fraud rule configuration are included in both implementation engagements and ongoing support retainers.
